name: blue-sage/feature-grid
title: BS — Feature Grid
description: Showcase product features in three layouts: icon grid, alternating split rows, or large contrast cards.

default.title: Blazing Fast
default.body: Optimized for Core Web Vitals. Ships with Lighthouse 95+ performance scores out of the box.

default.title: Secure by Default
default.body: Hardened against OWASP top-10 vulnerabilities with automatic security updates and malware scanning.

default.title: Analytics Ready
default.body: Structured data, JSON-LD, and Generative Engine Optimization built in from day one.

default.title: 200+ Integrations
default.body: Works seamlessly with all major WordPress plugins and third-party services without conflict.

default.title: Priority Support
default.body: Dedicated support team with 24-hour response times and a comprehensive knowledge base.

default.title: Fully Customizable
default.body: Deep customization through the Site Editor with zero coding required. Your brand, your rules.
